name: C-4 checkpoint file records the merkle_root and last_line_number fields per the architecture
command: for i in 1 2; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event e$i --actor a --data '{}'; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --emit-checkpoint-now && ckpt=$(ls compliance/audit-checkpoints/*.json | head -1) && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(process.argv[1],"utf8"));process.exit(j.merkle_root&&j.merkle_root.startsWith("sha256:")&&typeof j.last_line_number==="number"?0:1)' "$ckpt" && echo merkle 1>&2
